Ascend C tall_skinny_matrix_multiplication kernel implementation
API: MatMul Gemm
AscendC matmul (GEMM) kernel examples optimized for tall-skinny matrices with host tiling, operator registration, and TPipe/TQue usage.

Ascend C tall_skinny_matrix_multiplication kernel implementation
API: MatMul Gemm
Please retrieve an AscendC example for a tall-skinny matrix multiplication (TSCM) single-matmul custom kernel with operator registration, tiling strategy, and PyTorch NPU binding.

Ascend C tall_skinny_matrix_multiplication kernel implementation
API: MatMul Gemm
AscendC example for a non-batched tall-skinny matrix multiplication (M>>N or N>>M) custom op using matmul primitives (e.g., TSCM) with complete project.json, tiling, host operator, kernel, PyTorch binding, and model code.
